pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified integer underflow vulnerabilities in epochSupplyContractionLeft updates. SWC-107 is justified by multiple reentrancy findings in redeemBonds and governanceRecoverUnsupported functions despite contradictory reports. Evidence: Underflow found in epochSupplyContractionLeft updates (Task 8); Reentrancy in redeemBonds function (Task 1); Reentrancy in governanceRecoverUnsupported via token callbacks (Task 4)
